research_basis: OpenTelemetry semantic conventions standardize telemetry attributes for correlation.
DORA metrics include instability and recovery measures such as change fail rate, rework rate, and failed deployment recovery time.
SLSA artifact verification stresses provenance/expectation checks and monitoring only becomes useful when action is taken.
rules: Every learning event must bind to evidence and a recurrence key.
Every action-required learning event must route to DEBUGGING, ECL, SEE/MMD, FIR, STOP_BLOCKED, or METHOD_ROUTER_UPDATE.
Every method record must reconcile attempts = successes + failures.
Low reliability methods must be demoted, watched, or forbidden.
Methods with blocked failures cannot be promoted.
Forbidden methods must emit FORBID decisions.
Router updates must include evidence references and stable hashes.
